title: 皐月賞の後に・研ぎ澄ますは

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I was unable to claim victory... How
disappointing.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Satsuki Sho over, I head out to greet
Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for such a disappointing
performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Far from outshining the crown jewel, I only
managed to showcase how dull my light remains...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In no way did I perform to the best of my current
ability...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Although it looks like her frustration has kept her from realizing it, Mejiro Ardan has just returned with dignity after participating in the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her debut race, she outright collapsed from
exhaustion. But now, even after having finished a
G1 race, she stands strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That she can now compete in G1 races is a
testament to how much she's grown!
choice_data_list:
Let's learn from this experience and work even
harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...It's very much like you to say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because you always have your sights
on what's ahead that I can continue moving
forward as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When I run in the Aoba Sho, I shall not repeat any
of the mistakes I made today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you continue to provide me with your
guidance and support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Aoba Sho right around the corner,
Mejiro Ardan has shown me how committed she is
to delivering results that'll put us in good stead
for the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was in perfect form today. There was no way I
could've run any better.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But I was bested all the same...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ardan was sharp as a blade. I felt her pressure
throughout the whole race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And she, too, will surely utilize what she has
learned today to push herself harder still...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But things will not play out this way at the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Next time... I will prevail!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, Yaeno... Even now, I can still feel the
intensity of their running...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I just know that their skills will be even more
polished when the Derby comes around!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to rest on my laurels! I have to aim
higher—far higher than now, for someplace
beyond even their grasp!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I have to, otherwise...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My wish to be like my role model... to catch up to
her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My wish to win the race she yearns for... All my
feelings... The vow I made... They'll all be for
nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I can't let that happen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I have to train even, even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With each of the three racers harboring their own
aspirations, the Japanese Derby draws ever
closer...
